pipeline.summary: Ambry Genetics announced enhancements to its hereditary cancer testing menu, including the addition of MLH3 to its CancerNext®, CancerNext–Expanded®, and ColoNext® base panels due to upgraded gene-disease validity for autosomal recessive polyposis and colorectal cancer predisposition.
pipeline.product_or_program: CancerNext®, CancerNext–Expanded®, and ColoNext® (with MLH3 inclusion)
pipeline.why_it_matters: This enhancement to Ambry's hereditary cancer testing menu indicates an updated offering that could drive increased test volumes, creating demand for associated lab supplies, reagents, and consumables.

regulatory.summary: Tempus AI, Inc. announced the clinical launch of the ArteraAI Prostate Test (mHSPC), a CLIA-certified and CAP-accredited prognostic test for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer, which will be integrated into the Tempus platform.
regulatory.why_it_matters: The launch of a new CLIA-certified and CAP-accredited test integrated into the Tempus platform, which Ambry Genetics is part of, indicates upcoming demand for lab supplies, reagents, and consumables required for performing this prostate cancer prognostic test.

volume.summary: Ambry Genetics announced enhancements to its hereditary cancer testing menu, specifically adding MLH3 to its CancerNext®, CancerNext–Expanded®, and ColoNext® base panels.
volume.volume_change: Expansion of test menu by including MLH3 in base panels, implying potential for increased test volume.
volume.driver: Upgraded gene-disease validity (GDV) for MLH3 in autosomal recessive polyposis and colorectal cancer predisposition.
volume.why_it_matters: Higher test volume for these expanded hereditary cancer panels directly increases the demand for reagents, consumables, and potentially lab equipment used in genetic sequencing and analysis.

ai_summary: Ambry Genetics is expanding its hereditary cancer testing menu by adding MLH3 to its CancerNext and ColoNext panels, driven by new gene-disease validity. This enhancement signals increased testing volume and a need for specific molecular biology reagents, consumables, and potentially new instrumentation. Sales teams should engage to understand evolving supply needs for these growing diagnostic services.
